title: rubus exaltatus var. bracteosus
intro: Rubus exaltatus var. bracteosus, also known as the Himalayan blackberry or Himalayan raspberry, is a variant of the Rubus exaltatus species, belonging to the Rosaceae family of flowering plants. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Rubus exaltatus var. bracteosus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including fever, colds, and digestive issues.
